data.title: Top Crunch Fitness Franchisee CR Fitness Holdings Announces One-Day Only Cyber Sale for Crunch Pompano Beach
data.description: In Pompano Beach, Florida, on March 26, 2026, CR Fitness Holdings, the top franchisee of Crunch Fitness in the country, is excited to reveal a one-day Cyber Sale for the latest Crunch location, Crunch Pompano Beach, on Saturday, March 28th. This special event will feature exclusive deals for patrons.

data.title: Viper Networks Subsidiary 0Wire Communications Joins the Caribbean Datacenter Association (CDA)
data.description: TROY, Mich. and WILLEMSTAD, Curaçao, March 26, 2026 - Viper Networks subsidiary 0Wire Communications, under the OTCID VPER, has become an Affiliate Member of the Caribbean Datacenter Association. The Caribbean Datacenter Association aims to establish advanced infrastructure linking datacenters and aiding the expansion of the digital economy in the region. Their goal is to promote development, cooperation, and excellence among datacenter operators and technology in the Caribbean region.

data.title: XRP Ledger enhances security with AI Red Team, discovering 10+ bugs for institutional DeFi push.
data.description: Ripple (XRP) has revealed plans for an AI-driven security improvement on the XRPL platform. A specialized red team has already identified over 10 bugs as part of the overhaul. This comes as the network gears up for an institutional DeFi expansion. The move is aimed at enhancing the security of the network as it grows to accommodate more users and transactions.

data.title: Robert Half: NEARLY TWO-THIRDS OF MANAGERS SAY AI-GENERATED RESUMES ARE MAKING HIRING HARDER
data.description: In today's AI-driven era, companies face challenges in verifying the skills and experiences of job candidates. AI tools have revolutionized the job application process, allowing individuals to enhance their resumes and tailor applications effectively. However, this technological advancement has also posed a conundrum for hiring managers who now struggle to authenticate the skill sets and backgrounds of potential employees. This issue highlights the need for innovative solutions to efficiently verify candidate credentials amidst a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Keymed Biosciences Announces 2025 Annual Results and Business Updates
data.description: In Beijing on March 26, 2026, Keymed Biosciences (HKEX: 02162) revealed its financial performance for 2025, reporting a total revenue of about RMB 720 million, marking a notable 67% surge compared to the previous year. Notably, sales of the key product Kangyueda® contributed roughly RMB 310 million to this revenue.

data.title: BigID Delivers Integrated AI Governance for Employee AI Use: One Platform for Access Enforcement, Activity Monitoring, and Data Loss Prevention
data.description: BigID, a prominent company in data security, privacy, and AI governance, recently introduced a new comprehensive feature that manages employee access, information sharing, and data handling through artificial intelligence from one centralized platform. This innovation, launched on March 26, 2026 in San Francisco, signifies a major breakthrough in streamlining data control processes.

data.title: ZeroThreat.ai Wins Cybersecurity Excellence Award for Innovation in Web Application Security
data.description: In the recent 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards, ZeroThreat.ai was honored with the Silver award in the category of Web Application Security. This recognition applauds the company's unique strategy in pinpointing genuine, exploitable weaknesses. Noteworthy for employing advanced AI technology, the platform differentiates itself by mimicking attacker actions to confirm vulnerabilities.

data.title: A New Chapter for a Trusted Name: Triple T Electric Partners with PowerChampions To Become Triple T Critical Power Services
data.description: Triple T Electric has joined forces with PowerChampions to become Triple T Critical Power Services, a partnership led by skilled trades entrepreneur Ashish Achlerkar. This rebranding follows an official announcement in Sumter, South Carolina in March.
